text:
Gap Analysis:
1. MongoDB Support and MongoDB Engineer Team
Document issue (good example sha-256) support should open a help case
to find information or spend hours digging in GitHub
Most of the internal help cases were answered in EMEA time,
For some issues, such as SDK challenge, suppert may not be fit for
troubleshooting (and the case is open for eight months)
Readiness
- Bugs
2. MongoDB Support and 7-Eleven
a. (7-Eleven) Screen Sharing
b. (7-Eleven) invalid expectation (SLA and request for having developer on
call)
3. 7-Eleven internal
a. (7-Eleven) RIS team needs to gain experience in both their network and
security skills.
